data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. DEETZ LIGHTING was in the money at Miami Valley Raceway two runs ago before finishing seventh at her latest appearance over 1609m at Miami Valley Raceway, beaten 30 metres. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. This should be an easier assignment so she is a major player. 9. VANELLOPE turned in a good effort at her latest appearance to get home by a narrow margin over 1609m at this track on April 8. Should enjoy a nice smother from this draw and will be looking for a split at some stage. Won't find this any harder and she can get the job done again. 8. COUNTONLUNA is in the mix at her first run since finishing third over 1609m at this track six months ago. 4. DUBLINS BREANNA ended last prep with a win at this track over 1609m six-and-a-half months ago. Capable of a forward showing while fresh.","runners":[3,9,8,4],"exclusive":false}
